notes: Anthropic prices below are for Claude Opus 4.7 (the model the external-researcher sub-agent runs under).
Web search via the Anthropic API is metered separately at $10 / 1000 searches. Web fetch is free.
If `claude -p --output-format json` does not surface sub-agent token counts cleanly, the harness records what it can and notes the gap in bench/README.md.

parallel_task._pricing_unit: Pricing is per Task Run, not per output field. No per-token or per-source surcharges.
